zh.East Peckham, Kent, England: 英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Mainwaring於1392年出生在英國爾奧維 奧福時，她的父親Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet29歲，母親Lady Margery Venables , Baroness23歲。她於1409年與William de Bromley在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年在英國英格蘭爾巴丁頓享年40歲。

zh-hans.East Peckham, Kent, England: 英国肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Mainwaring于1392年出生在英国爾奧維 奧福时，她的父亲Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet29岁，母亲Lady Margery Venables , Baroness23岁。她于1409年与William de Bromley在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年在英国英格兰爾巴丁頓享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mainwaring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mesnil-Varin in Saint-Paër (Seine-Maritime, Haute-Normandie). The placename means ‘domain of Warin’ (see   Waring  ). Compare   Manwaring   and   Mandry  .
Irish: adopted for Ó Manaráin, see Mannering 2.

variants.name: Manwaring
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Mainwaring  .

variants.name: Waring
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Warren , from the Norman personal name Warin, derived from ancient Germanic Warino, a short form of various compound names based on the element warin ‘protection, shelter’ or ‘guard’. The name was popular in France and among the Normans (see Guerin ).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Mainwaring was born in 1392, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, was 29 and her mother, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, was 23. She married William de Bromley in 1409, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1432, in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Mainwaring est née en 1392, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William de Bromley en 1409, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Baddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 40 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Mainwaring 1392 in Over Peover, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet 29 und ihre Mutter Lady Margery Venables , Baroness 23. Sie hat 1409 in Cheshire, England William de Bromley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Baddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Mainwaring è nata il nel 1392 nel Over Peover, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William de Bromley nel 1409, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1432, nel Baddington, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 40 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Mainwaringが1392年にイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで生まれた時，父Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronetは29歳，母Lady Margery Venables , Baronessは23歳であった。1409年にイギリスチェシュアイアでWilliam de Bromleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアバッドイントンで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Mainwaring(이)가 1392년 영국 체실르 버 프오버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Margery Venables , Baroness(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 체실르에서 William de Bromley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 바딩턴에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Mainwaring nasceu em 1392, em Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Bromley em 1409, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1432, em Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Mainwaring родилась в 1392 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Bromley в 1409 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности баддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Mainwaring nació en 1392, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ranulph Mainwaring . KT ,Knight,  Baronet, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Lady Margery Venables , Baroness, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William de Bromley en 1409, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1432, en Baddington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 40 años.
